headline: Columbus Macro Builds Stake in Broadstone Net Lease, According to Recent SEC Filing
summary: Broadstone Net Lease, Inc. regularly earns income from leases. However, when borrowing costs change, the company’s growth can be affected. These fluctuations may influence investor valuations, even when property performance remains stable.
